name: coding-python
description: Practical Python project setup, modern uv/ruff/ty/pytest workflows, PEP 723 scripts, and careful migration from legacy Python tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Use modern Python setup and repo-first development workflows.
interface.longDescription: Set up Python projects, work with existing uv, Poetry, or pip toolchains, add dependencies, run tests, format and lint code, type-check with ty, create PEP 723 scripts, migrate legacy tooling when requested, and scaffold pyproject.toml-based projects.
defaultPrompt: Use Coding Python to set up this project.
Use Coding Python to add tests and run the Python toolchain.
Use Coding Python to scaffold a new pyproject.toml project.
Use Coding Python to migrate this project to uv, ruff, and ty.
